Name: Level5 Semi - Automatic Drywall Banjo
Short description: The LEVEL5 Banjo Drywall Taper is an intermediate or “semi-automatic” tool that enables you to apply paper tape or Fibafuse to flat drywall seams with precision and efficiency.
Description:
The LEVEL5 Banjo Drywall Taper is an intermediate or “semi-automatic” tool that enables you to apply paper tape or Fibafuse to flat drywall seams with precision and efficiency.

While not quite as fast as an automatic drywall taper (#4-760), the banjo is much faster than hand taping. For any drywall finishing job of 10 sheets or more, this tool will save you valuable time while achieving professional results. It is also easy to clean when the job is done.

The LEVEL5 Banjo Drywall Taper is a commercial-grade workhorse. It features an aircraft-grade aluminum body that has been fully anodized for corrosion resistance. The hinged lid has a high quality urethane rubber seal and industrial-quality latches. The banjo also features an adjustable flow gate with an integrated tape cutter as well as a comfortable, soft-grip handle.

  • SAVE TIME & MAKE MORE MONEY >> Simultaneously apply an even coat of joint compound and tape over flat drywall seams. By using a LEVEL5 Banjo, you'll save valuable time, achieve professional results, and increase your profitability.
  • EASY TO USE >> Features a flow gate with an integrated tape cutter. Based on the compound's consistency, you can easily adjust the amount of dispensing compound. When you complete a seam, you can cut the tape without a knife.
  • EASY TO MASTER >> The LEVEL5 Banjo is easy to use and can be learned in minutes. Plus, it's simple to teach others and scale up your drywall finishing business!
  • EASY TO MAINTAIN >> With a hinged cover that opens wide, cleaning and maintaining your LEVEL5 Banjo is a breeze. With proper cleaning and lubrication, your LEVEL5 Banjo will last indefinitely.
  • DURABILITY AT ITS BEST >> Built from aircraft-grade aluminum, LEVEL5 Banjos are lightweight, yet built to withstand the rigours of commercial use. All surfaces are anodized for corrosion resistance and peak performance.
  • GUARANTEED PERFORMANCE >> LEVEL5 offers a 7-year "no hassle" warranty - the best in the industry.

Features

  • Aircraft-grade aluminum body
  • Premium color anodizing for easy cleaning and corrosion resistance
  • Composite tape roll holder that won’t shrink or crack over time
  • Adjustable flow gate with integrated tape cutter
  • Heavy-duty, soft-grip top handle
  • Adjustable hand strap with thumb rest for better control on the wall
  • Hinged lid
  • Proprietary urethane rubber anti-leak seal
  • Industrial-quality latches

The most popular handle size for both skimming blades and compound rollers is the medium (37-63") handle because it can be used for a variety of wall and ceiling finishing applications. Name: Level5 Skimming Blade Pole Adapter
Short description: The LEVEL5 Drywall Skimming Blade Handle Adapter is used to connect a range of extendable handles to LEVEL5 Composite-Body Skimming Blades.
Description:
The LEVEL5 Drywall Skimming Blade Handle Adapter is used to connect a range of extendable handles to LEVEL5 Composite-Body Skimming Blades.

LEVEL5 Composite-Body Skimming Blades feature a composite blade back that is easily affixed to LEVEL5's range of specialized skimming blade handles. Simply connect your skimming blade to a handle using this skimming blade handle adapter to get that extra versatility needed to finish high walls & ceilings. Attaching a handle to your skimming blade can also significantly increase your finishing speed as well as reduce strain on your wrists and back.

The LEVEL5 skimming blade handle adapter is manufactured using a lightweight but highly resilient glass-filled composite material for long lasting durability. LEVEL5 skimming blade handles snap into place via two buttons on the handle to ensure a tight fit that won't wobble or unscrew during use. A thumb screw on the handle adapter allows LEVEL5 Skimming Blades to be fixed securely at a wide range of angles.

Features

  • Quick-release handle adapter design allows for on-the-fly changes between different handle lengths without compromising rigidity.
  • Each adapter also features two quick release tabs on the top of the handle adapter; when these tabs are pulled up, the handle adapter pops off the composite skimming blade housing.
  • Constructed from highly resilient, glass-filled composite for long lasting durability.
  • Attaches to one of three LEVEL5 skimming blade extension handles (Medium & Long).
  • Both the handle adapter and LEVEL5 skimming blade housings have centering lines. This enables these components to be easily aligned for a perfect balance and even blade pressure.

Extension pole and skimming blade sold separately.

Name: Level5 Stainless Steel Flex Offset Knife with Soft Grip Handle
Short description: Stainless Steel Flex Offset Knife with Soft Grip Handle
Description:
Stainless Steel Flex Offset Knife with Soft Grip Handle

  • 0.5mm FLEX Blade ›› With a 4” deep blade, this FLEX version is ideal for finishing coats and offers perfect flex for maximum feel and control. Features a rounded-edge stainless steel blade to reduce lap marks. Also great for overhead finishing or wiping down tape when mounted to a pole using the adaptor provided.
  • Handle offset slightly from the blade edge. This design enables you to lay the blade flatter against the wall for a smoother, tighter finish. Produce a top notch finish easier and more efficiently, while simultaneously reducing wrist and hand fatigue.
  • Ergonomic handle design that enables you mount the knife to a standard painter’s pole (using the included adapter with 180+ degrees of angle adjustment for perfect comfort).
  • Threaded, removable die-cast zinc hammer end can be used to reset drywall screws. Also protects from mud accumulation inside handle when angle adapter is not used.

Name: Level5 Tape Jam Remover Tool
Short description: Generally speaking, jams will most frequently occur when the cutter blade returns to its retracted position after use. Small pieces of cut tape may catch on the blade after repeated cutting, causing a small obstruction within the left hand side of the taper head (when the head is facing you).
Description:
Generally speaking, jams will most frequently occur when the cutter blade returns to its retracted position after use. Small pieces of cut tape may catch on the blade after repeated cutting, causing a small obstruction within the left hand side of the taper head (when the head is facing you).

A Tape Jam Remover is a flat and narrow steel tool that is designed to slide easily into the taper feeder slot. Its design gives you a precise feel for the position of the blockage and lets you efficiently dislodge it.

It is important to clean the automatic taper properly after each use so that particles of tape or mud do not have a chance to dry in the head. For cleaning instructions and maintenance tips check out this helpful video:

HOW TO USE A TAPE JAM REMOVER TOOL

Don’t let a tape jam slow you down on the job site. Follow the steps listed below to quickly eliminate a jam and keep your taper moving.

  1. First remove any tape that is currently in the feeder.
  2. Then, raise the control sleeve of the auto taper to move the advancing needle out of the way so that it doesn’t impede the movement of the Tape Jam Remover tool.
  3. Next, with the control needle out of the way, gently slide the Tape Jam Remover tool into the tape feeder slot. The aim is to move the tool all the way up through the taper feeder slot mimicking the movement of tape through the auto taper.
  4. Then, for the most effective release of the jam, shift the Tape Jam Remover tool from left to right to “feel” for the blockage.
  5. In many cases, the jam will be closest to the retracted position of the cutting blade, in the left side corner of the taper when the taper head is facing you.
  6. Once you have evacuated the jam, you are ready to use the taper again.

TOOL MAINTENANCE & STORAGE

It is important to clean your tools and accessories immediately after each use. Follow these steps to keep your LEVEL5 tape jam remover tool looking and performing like new.

  1. Run warm water over the Tape Jam Remover tool to soften any joint compound that may still be present. Use a brush or sponge with soft bristles to remove any debris or mud. Do not use wire brushes or other harsh abrasives
  2. For a deeper clean, a mild detergent or dish soap can be used with warm water. Rinse the tool thoroughly in warm water, then pat it dry with a soft towel.
  3. After cleaning, store the tool in a dry area.

USAGE VIDEOS

Short description: LEVEL5 offers a full line of finishing trowels that are manufactured under a proprietary innovative design and strict quality manufacturing requirements in Europe. These hand trowels offer the finisher some outstanding features, including:
Description:
LEVEL5 offers a full line of finishing trowels that are manufactured under a proprietary innovative design and strict quality manufacturing requirements in Europe. These hand trowels offer the finisher some outstanding features, including:

  • Precision powder-coated aluminum handle mount that is rigid yet lightweight and durable.
  • Robotically welded super-strong surface-mounted rivets that last longer than typical "through-rivet" designs.
  • Premium grade, European hardened stainless steel blades
  • Patented Leather Composite Handles

LEVEL5 Trowels feature an ergonomic handle with a high impact composite core that has been overmolded with a brushed leather composite. This handle offers superior comfort, does not get slippery when wet, and is far more durable than traditional wound leather handles. The shape and position of the handle relative to the tang/blade mount ensures reduced fatigue during use. The handle height also provides adequate clearance from the blade tang so even those with larger hands can use this trowel with comfort.

Rigid Flat Trowels

LEVEL5 Standard Rigid Trowels feature 0.7mm triple hardened gold stainless steel. This rigid blade design is ideal for drywall joint compound; plaster; EIFS; stucco, etc.

With precision ground edges and corners, LEVEL5 Standard Trowels are pre-broke for an ideal feel right out of the box!

The blade on LEVEL5 Standard Trowels is mounted to a precision cast handle mount (tang) with strong, stainless steel surface welded rivets. This attachment method is far superior to typical "through-rivet" designs and is guaranteed to stand up to the most severe work environments.

Features Include

  • Triple-hardened premium stainless steel.
  • Precision-ground, pre-broke edges and corners. These hand trowels are ready to go right out of the box.
  • High strength but lightweight aluminum handle mount.
  • Super-strong surface-mounted rivets that last longer than “through-rivet” designs.
  • High impact composite handle core for strength and durability.

Name: Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper
Short description: The Platinum Semi-Automatic Drywall Taper streamlines the taping process by applying joint compound and tape simultaneously, offering a cost-effective, consistent alternative to manual hand-taping.
Description:
Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper (PT-TP) offers a practical, high-efficiency solution for contractors and DIYers looking to accelerate their taping workflow without the significant investment required for fully mechanical systems. This tool effectively bridges the gap between manual hand-taping and automated equipment, allowing for the simultaneous application of joint compound and tape in one continuous, fluid motion. By drawing directly from a standard 5-gallon bucket, it eliminates the need for manual pre-loading, ensuring a faster and more consistent job site experience.

Engineered for reliable performance, the device features an integrated adjustment mechanism that allows operators to precisely regulate the thickness of the compound application. This level of control ensures uniform coverage across seams, which significantly reduces the time spent on sanding and touch-up work during the finishing phase. Its straightforward, durable design is accessible for those new to drywall finishing while maintaining the structural integrity required for daily professional use.

Features:

  • Adjustable Flow Control: A precision wing nut allows for exact customization of the mud-to-tape ratio, ensuring optimal coverage for various joint conditions.
  • Streamlined Workflow: Designed for direct integration with standard 5-gallon buckets, significantly reducing setup time and simplifying the cleaning process.
  • Consistent Application: Delivers a uniform layer of compound on every pull, resulting in a cleaner finish and reduced labor time compared to traditional hand-taping methods.
  • Durable Construction: Built to withstand the rigors of daily use, providing a reliable, long-term tool for both professional contractors and large-scale projects.

Name: TapeTech MAXXBOX® High Capacity Finishing Box
Short description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or second coat when you’re filling the joint – without the unnecessary weight you don’t need on the finish coat. The TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the opti
Description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or second coat when you’re filling the joint – without the unnecessary weight you don’t need on the finish coat. The TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the optimum capacity to weight ratio. This means that you get more “usable” joint compound – the amount that you can actually get out of the finishing box and onto the wall – when you actually need it, like on the first coat. The TapeTech 7” MAXXBOX® finishing box delivers 94% more usable joint compound than the standard EasyClean® finishing box (model EZ07TT) and up to 68% more usable capacity than competitive high capacity finishing boxes. Step up to the boxes designed to hold and deliver the right amount. Every time. Every box. MAXXBOX®. Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints

Short description: Frame CROLL04CG TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a spraye
Description: TapeTech 4" Premium Compound Roller with Frame CROLL04CG TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Name: TapeTech 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame
Short description: Ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels.
Description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2″ compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity : TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap – nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Name: TapeTech Compound Roller Support Handle (44"–79")
Short description: - 79" (2m) CROLLHAN2 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out
Description: TapeTech Compound Roller Support Handle 44" - 79" (2m) CROLLHAN2 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Ideal Length: The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 Support Handle for TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers extends from 44” – 79”, the most versatile range of extension handles for compound rollers. Robust but Lightweight: You don’t want unnecessary weight when you have a roller full of joint compound. The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 is the perfect balance of light weight and robust materials to make you as efficient as possible. Twist and Go: Our simple twist-lock design allows you to quickly make adjustments on the fly, without worrying about mechanical extension failures taking you and your project down. Lock and Load: Our CROLLHAN2 Support Handle quickly attaches to our range of four premium drywall joint compound roller frames and rollers. Name: TapeTech Extendable Angle Box Handle (XHTT/CAA)
Short description: Extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system. One support handle can be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters!
Description: TapeTech XHTT/CAA is an all-new aluminum extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system. One support handle can be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. TapeTech XHTT/CAA Interchangeable Handle Kit Features: Includes the CAA adapter for older style corner finisher boxes or angle boxes Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight and maneuverable at only 2.15 lbs Use a single handle with attachments for a variety of tools. 1.25" Diameter is comfortable and ergonomic D-Shaped fitting end that eliminates corner box movement Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator adapter (CAA-TT) is included with the new Corner Applicators (CA07TT and CA08TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Corner Applicators. The Nail Spotter adapter (NSA-TT) is included with the new Nail Spotters (Models NS02TT and NS03TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Nail Spotters. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter.

Name: TapeTech Semi - Auto Taping Tool Kit
Short description: Kit is designed to dramatically boost your taping and finishing productivity compared to traditional hand taping. These semi-automatic tools improve efficiency and consistency, while minimizing material waste—saving you both time and money on every job.
Description: TapeTech Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit This kit is designed to dramatically boost your taping and finishing productivity compared to traditional hand taping. These semi-automatic tools improve efficiency and consistency, while minimizing material waste—saving you both time and money on every job. The included TapeTech Compound Tube allows for smooth, even application of joint compound to flat seams and inside corners. Attach the flat and corner applicators to the tube for easy, controlled compound delivery. After applying compound, use the corner roller to bed the tape securely into drywall angles. Finish with the corner flusher to achieve a clean, feathered finish in inside corners. The complete kit comes packed in a durable, custom-fit carrying case—making it easy to transport, store, and protect your tools on any jobsite. Features: Boost efficiency and reduce material waste compared to hand taping. Compound tube enables precise and even compound application. All essential tools for each step of the taping process included in one convenient kit. Custom case protects your tools and simplifies transportation. Kit Includes: TapeTech 42" Compound Tube CT42TT TapeTech 2.5" Direct Flusher CF25TT TapeTech 3" Direct Flusher CF30TT TapeTech 90º Inside Mud Applicator Head 16TT90 TapeTech 90º Outside Mud Applicator Head 16TT TapeTech Corner Roller Head 15TTE TapeTech Extendable Support Handle XHTT TapeTech Fiberglass Support Handle FHTT TapeTech Handle Adapter CFA-TT TapeTech 46" Hard Utility Case
